hausa.review_your_mission_objectives_and_cre: Duba manufofin aikinka da rabon ma'aikata
hausa.countdown_and_liftoff_from_kennedy_spa: Ƙidaya da tashi daga Kennedy Space Center
hausa.reach_low_earth_orbit_and_prepare_for_: Isa ƙananan falakin Duniya kuma ka shirya don Trans-Lunar Injection
hausa.explore_the_lunar_surface_and_collect_: Bincika saman Wata kuma ka tara samfura
hausa.launch_from_the_moon_and_rendezvous_wi: Harba daga Wata kuma ka haɗu da na'urar umarni
hausa.re_entry_splashdown: Sake Shiga da Sauka cikin Ruwa
hausa.survive_re_entry_and_splash_down_in_th: Tsira daga sake shiga kuma ka sauka cikin Tekun Pasifik
hausa.pilots_the_lunar_module_to_the_surface: Yana tuƙa na'urar Wata zuwa saman kuma yana jagorantar EVA
hausa.orbits_the_moon_alone_in_the_command_m: Yana kewaya Wata shi kaɗai a cikin na'urar umarni yayin da CDR da LMP suke bincike
hausa.assists_with_descent_and_eva_operates_: Yana taimakawa wajen sauka da EVA, yana sarrafa kayan kimiyya
hausa.this_ancient_rock_from_the_lunar_highl: Wannan dutsen tsoho daga tsaunukan Wata yana da shekaru biliyan 4.4 — kusan tsoho kamar Wata kanta. Yana gaya mana cewa Wata ya taɓa samun tekun magma na duniya.
hausa.dark_volcanic_basalt_filled_the_moon_s: Basalt mai duhu na dutsen mai aman wuta ya cika manyan kwarin tasiri na Wata kuma ya ƙirƙiri «tekuna» masu duhu (maria) da ake gani daga Duniya. Waɗannan laɓobi sun fashe shekaru biliyan 3-3.5 da suka wuce.
hausa.a_jumbled_mix_of_rock_fragments_welded: Cakuda mara tsari na ƙananan duwatsu da aka haɗa tare ta hanyar tasirin meteorite. An riƙa bugun saman Wata fiye da shekaru biliyan 4.
hausa.lunar_soil_is_ground_up_rock_from_bill: Ƙasar Wata dutse ne da aka niƙa daga biliyoyin shekaru na bama-bamai na ƙananan meteorite. Har ma tana da ƙananan ƙwallon gilashi da alamun barbashin iskar rana.
hausa.apollo_17_found_orange_soil_tiny_glass: Apollo 17 ya sami ƙasa mai launin lemu — ƙananan ƙwallon gilashi daga fashewar dutsen mai aman wuta na da shekaru biliyan 3.7 da suka wuce. Ɗaya ne daga cikin abubuwan ban sha'awa da Apollo ya gano!
hausa.kreep_stands_for_potassium_k_rare_eart: KREEP yana nufin Potassium (K), Rare Earth Elements, da Phosphorus (P). Waɗannan ma'adanai sun taru a cikin sauran ƙarshen tekun magma na Wata.
hausa.meteorite_impacts_melt_rock_into_glass: Tasirin meteorite yana narkar da dutse zuwa gilashi, wanda yake tashi cikin sararin samaniya kuma yake sauka kamar ƙananan ƙwallaye. Wasu suna da iskar gas da aka kama daga tsohuwar yanayin Wata.
hausa.apollo_15_found_this_4_1_billion_year_: Apollo 15 ya sami wannan anorthosite na shekaru biliyan 4.1, ɗaya daga cikin tsofaffin duwatsu da aka taɓa tarawa. Ya taimaka wajen tabbatar da ka'idar tekun magma game da samuwar Wata.
hausa.the_moon_is_about_384_400_km_away_ligh: Wata yana da nisan kusan km 384,400 — haske yana ɗaukar daƙiƙa 1.3 don isa can!
hausa.apollo_missions_took_about_3_days_each: Manufofin Apollo sun ɗauki kusan kwana 3 kowane gefe, suna tafiya da saurin ~km 3,900/awa.
hausa.the_moon_s_gravity_is_1_6_of_earth_s_a: Nauyin Wata shine 1/6 na Duniya. Mutum mai kilo 70 yana da nauyin ~kilo 12 kawai a can!
hausa.the_sunlit_side_reaches_127_c_while_th: Gefen rana yana kaiwa 127°C, yayin da gefen duhu yake faɗuwa zuwa -173°C!
hausa.12_astronauts_walked_on_the_moon_acros: Yan sama jannati 12 sun yi tafiya a Wata a cikin Apollo 11, 12, 14, 15, 16, da 17.
hausa.buzz_aldrin_said_contact_light_first_b: Buzz Aldrin ya faɗi «Contact light» da farko, amma jimlar Armstrong sananniya ta fara da «That's».
hausa.the_first_stage_burned_rp_1_kerosene_w: Mataki na farko ya ƙone kananzir na RP-1 da iskar oxygen na ruwa — fiye da tan 2,000 na man fetur cikin minti 2.5!
hausa.sound_needs_a_medium_air_water_to_trav: Sauti yana buƙatar matsakaici (iska/ruwa) don tafiya. Wata ba shi da yanayi, don haka yana shiru gaba ɗaya.
hausa.every_apollo_astronaut_reported_that_m: Kowane ɗan sama jannati na Apollo ya ba da rahoton cewa ƙurar Wata tana ƙamshin barda da aka ƙone sa'ad da suka kawo ta cikin LM!
hausa.the_oldest_moon_rocks_are_4_4_billion_: Tsofaffin duwatsun Wata suna da shekaru biliyan 4.4 — kusan tsoho kamar Tsarin Rana!
hausa.the_moon_is_about_384_400_km_away_ligh_2: Wata yana da nisan kusan km 384,400 — haske yana ɗaukar daƙiƙa 1.3 don isa can!
hausa.rotate_spacecraft_to_expose_vent_to_su: Juya jirgin sama don fallasa ramin iska ga rana
hausa.reroute_cabin_heater_duct_to_warm_the_: Sake jagorantar bututun mai zafi na ɗaki don ɗumama bututun
hausa.seal_the_vent_and_use_backup_waste_bag: Rufe ramin iska kuma ka yi amfani da jakunkunan shara na ajiya
hausa.trust_the_computer_and_continue_go: Amince da kwamfuta kuma ka ci gaba — «Tafi!»
hausa.boulder_field_at_landing_site: Filin manyan duwatsu a wurin sauka!
hausa.take_manual_control_and_fly_past_the_b: Ɗauki sarrafa hannu kuma ka tashi wuce duwatsun
hausa.abort_and_try_again_next_orbit: Soke kuma ka sake gwadawa a falaki na gaba
hausa.immediately_isolate_tank_2_and_switch_: Nan da nan ka ware tanki 2 kuma ka canza zuwa tanki 1
hausa.vent_tank_2_to_relieve_pressure: Fitar da iska tanki 2 don rage matsi
hausa.try_to_reset_the_tank_heater_circuit: Gwada sake saita da'irar mai zafi na tanki
hausa.administer_anti_nausea_medication_and_: Ba da maganin hana tashin zuciya da lokacin hutu
hausa.tough_it_out_keep_working_through_the_: Jure shi — ci gaba da aiki duk da tashin zuciya
hausa.reduce_visual_stimulation_and_close_wi: Rage abubuwan gani kuma ka rufe labulen taga
hausa.guided_experience_auto_landing_extende: Gogewa mai jagora — sauka ta atomatik, O₂ mai tsawo
hausa.standard_apollo_parameters: Ma'aunin Apollo na yau da kullun
hausa.realistic_tight_fuel_budget_faster_o_d: Na gaskiya — ƙayyadadden kasafin man fetur, saurin amfani da O₂
hausa.complete_your_first_eva_moonwalk: Kammala tafiyarka ta farko a Wata ta EVA
hausa.complete_mission_on_commander_difficul: Kammala aikin a matakin wahala na Kwamanda
hausa.full_mission_simulation_launch_to_spla: Cikakken kwaikwayon aiki • Harba zuwa sauka cikin ruwa
hausa.apollo_style_lunar_landing_mission: Aikin sauka a Wata na salon Apollo
hausa.begin_mission_proceed_to_launch: 🚀 Fara Aiki — Ci gaba zuwa Harba
hausa.animated_saturn_v_rocket_launch_sequen: Jerin harba rokar Saturn V mai motsi. Ƙidaya na daƙiƙa 5 sannan hawa ta sararin samaniya zuwa falaki. Yana nuna tsayi, sauri, ƙarfin G, da raba matakai.
hausa.saturn_v_3_stages_7_5_million_lbs_thru: 🚀 Saturn V • Matakai 3 • Tursasawa lbs miliyan 7.5
hausa.watch_the_countdown_and_ascent_through: Kalli ƙidaya da hawa ta sararin samaniyar Duniya
hausa.proceed_to_earth_orbit_phase_after_suc: Ci gaba zuwa matakin falakin Duniya bayan harba mai nasara
hausa.animated_view_of_spacecraft_in_low_ear: Hangen jirgin sama mai motsi a ƙananan falakin Duniya a kilomita 185. CSM yana kammala falaki 1.5 yayin da tagar kunnawa don Trans-Lunar Injection ke daidaita da matsayin Wata na gaba. Ana nuna ƙidayar falaki, tsayi, sauri, da shirin TLI.
hausa.altitude_185_km_speed_28_000_km_h_1_5_: Tsayi: km 185 • Sauri: km 28,000/awa • Falaki 1.5 kafin kunna TLI
hausa.the_s_ivb_third_stage_will_fire_for_5_: Mataki na uku S-IVB zai kunna na minti 5 daƙiƙa 47 don haɓaka saurin daga km 28,000/awa zuwa km 38,900/awa — saurin tserewa. Wannan kunnawa ɗaya tana tura ka kan hanya zuwa Wata mai nisan km 384,400.
hausa.execute_trans_lunar_injection_burn_to_: Aiwatar da kunnawar Trans-Lunar Injection don fara tafiyar kwana 3 zuwa Wata
hausa.execute_tli_burn_head_to_the_moon: 🚀 Aiwatar da Kunnawar TLI — Nufi Wata
hausa.animated_trans_lunar_coast_earth_shrin: Tafiyar Trans-Lunar mai motsi. Duniya tana raguwa a hagu yayin da Wata ke girma a dama yayin da jirgin ke tafiya kilomita 384,400 cikin kwana 3. Yana nuna ƙidayar nisa da tattaunawar aiki.
hausa.arrive_at_the_moon_and_enter_lunar_orb: Isa Wata kuma ka shiga falakin Wata a tsayin kilomita 110
hausa.animated_view_of_spacecraft_orbiting_t: Hangen jirgin sama mai motsi yana kewaya Wata a tsayin kilomita 110. Yana nuna saman Wata mai ramuka, wurin sauka na Tekun Salama da aka yiwa alama da kore, da ɗigon jirgin sama mai kewayawa.
hausa.undock_lunar_module_eagle_from_command: Cire na'urar Wata Eagle daga na'urar umarni Columbia kuma ka fara saukar mai ƙarfi zuwa saman Wata
hausa.undock_begin_powered_descent: ⬇️ Cire kuma ka Fara Saukar Mai Ƙarfi
hausa.start_slowing_down_early_moon_gravity_: Fara rage gudu da wuri — nauyin Wata yana da laushi amma marar tausayi
hausa.watch_your_fuel_gauge_you_can_t_thrust: Kalli ma'aunin man fetur — ba za ka iya tursasawa ba tare da man fetur ba!
hausa.reduce_horizontal_speed_before_focusin: Rage saurin kwance kafin mai da hankali kan tsaye
hausa.the_real_apollo_11_landed_with_only_25: Apollo 11 na gaskiya ya sauka da daƙiƙa 25 kawai na man fetur da ya rage!
hausa.interactive_lunar_descent_piloting_gam: Wasan tuƙin saukar Wata mai hulɗa. Yi amfani da W ko kibiyar sama don tursasawa, A da D ko kibiyoyin hagu da dama don motsi na gefe. Sauka da saurin tsaye ƙasa da mita 3 a daƙiƙa da saurin kwance ƙasa da mita 5 a daƙiƙa.
hausa.begin_extravehicular_activity_moonwalk: Fara aiki na waje da jirgi (tafiya a Wata) don bincika saman Wata da tara samfuran yanayin ƙasa
hausa.collect_at_least_4_unique_rock_samples: Tara aƙalla samfuran duwatsu 4 na musamman don cika manufar yanayin ƙasa.
hausa.apollo_11_brought_back_47_5_lb_of_luna: Apollo 11 ya dawo da lb 47.5 na samfuran Wata; Apollo 17 ya dawo da lb 243.
hausa.in_one_sixth_gravity_a_hop_covers_abou: A cikin nauyi na ɗaya bisa shida, tsalle yana rufe kusan ninki shida na nisan kwance don ƙoƙari iri ɗaya.
hausa.earth_hangs_in_a_fixed_spot_in_the_lun: Duniya tana rataye a wuri ɗaya da aka kafa a sararin Wata saboda Wata yana cikin juyawa daidai (an kulle shi da igiyar ruwa).
hausa.moonwalk_3d_mode_unresolved: Yanayin 3D na Tafiya a Wata Bai Warware ba
hausa.webgl_failed_to_initialize_your_browse: WebGL ya kasa farawa. Mai bincikenka ko na'urarka na iya rashin tallafawa haɓakar kayan masarufi na 3D.
hausa.interactive_3d_lunar_surface_eva_use_w: EVA na 3D mai hulɗa a saman Wata. Yi amfani da WASD don tafiya, Space don tsalle a nauyi na ɗaya bisa shida, F don tara samfuran duwatsu, da linzami don duba kewaye. Tara samfuran yanayin ƙasa kuma ka bincika saman Wata kusa da na'urar Wata.
hausa.the_apollo_lunar_surface_experiments_p: Apollo Lunar Surface Experiments Package (ALSEP) ya yi aiki shekaru bayan yan sama jannati sun tafi. Na'urar auna girgizar ƙasa ta gano girgizar Wata da tasirin meteorite har zuwa 1977.
hausa.the_lunar_roving_vehicle_cost_38_milli: Lunar Roving Vehicle ya kashe dala miliyan 38. Motar Apollo 17 ta yi tafiya km 35.7 — har yanzu tana a ajiye a Wata da maɓallai!
hausa.the_flags_on_the_moon_have_been_bleach: Tutocin da ke Wata sun shuɗe zuwa fari mai tsabta ta hanyar shekaru da yawa na hasken UV mara tacewa. Tutar Apollo 12 kawai aka kakkaɓe ta hayaƙin injin.
hausa.lunar_seismometers_detected_deep_moonq: Na'urorin auna girgizar Wata sun gano girgizar Wata mai zurfi da ƙarfin igiyar ruwa na Duniya ya haifar a zurfin km 700-1100. Wata har yanzu yana da tushe da ya narke a wani ɓangare!
hausa.scientists_bounce_lasers_off_this_mirr: Masana kimiyya suna baƙar leza daga wannan madubi don auna nisan Duniya-Wata da daidaito na cm 1. Wata yana motsawa cm 3.8 nesa da Duniya kowace shekara.
hausa.explore_collect_samples_jump_in_1_6_gr: Bincika • Tara samfura • Tsalle a nauyi na 1/6!
hausa.animated_lunar_ascent_sequence_ascent_: Jerin hawan Wata mai motsi. Matakin hawa yana harba daga Wata yana barin matakin sauka a baya, yana hawa zuwa falakin Wata sama da kilomita 60, sannan yana yin haɗuwa-haɗawa da na'urar umarni Columbia mai kewayawa. HUD yana nuna tsayi, mataki, da nisa zuwa CSM.
hausa.ascent_stage_launches_from_moon_docks_: Matakin hawa yana harba daga Wata kuma yana haɗuwa da Columbia
hausa.the_lm_s_ascent_engine_a_single_start_: Injin hawa na LM — motar hypergolic mai kunnawa sau ɗaya ba tare da zaɓin soke ba — yana kunnawa don harba ka daga saman Wata. Matakin sauka yana aiki a matsayin tashar harba kuma yana zama a baya. Kana haɗuwa kuma kana haɗawa da Columbia, sannan ka watsar da «Eagle» (wanda a ƙarshe yake faɗuwa a Wata).
hausa.fire_trans_earth_injection_burn_to_beg: Kunna kunnawar Trans-Earth Injection don fara tafiyar kwana 3 na dawowa gida
hausa.the_service_module_engine_fires_for_th: Injin na'urar sabis yana kunnawa don Trans-Earth Injection. Kana shawagi zuwa Duniya na kwana 3, kana watsar da na'urar sabis, kuma kana shirya na'urar umarni don sake shiga — mataki mafi haɗari na aikin.
hausa.begin_atmospheric_re_entry_sequence_at: Fara jerin sake shiga sararin samaniya a kilomita 39,900 a kowace awa
hausa.animated_re_entry_sequence_command_mod: Jerin sake shiga mai motsi. Na'urar umarni tana shiga sararin samaniya a km 39,900/awa da zafin plasma har zuwa digiri 2,760. Yana nuna katsewar rediyo, ƙananan parachute, manyan parachute, da sauka cikin ruwan teku.
hausa.watch_the_command_module_survive_re_en: Kalli na'urar umarni tana tsira daga sake shiga ta cikin plasma na 2,760°C a km 39,900/awa, tana buɗe parachute, kuma tana sauka cikin Tekun Pasifik.
hausa.complete_the_mission_with_pacific_ocea: Kammala aikin da sauka cikin ruwan Tekun Pasifik. Barka da dawowa gida, Kwamanda!
hausa.mission_complete_splashdown: 🌊 Aikin Ya Kammala — Sauka cikin Ruwa!
hausa.welcome_home_commander_the_world_celeb: Barka da dawowa gida, Kwamanda. Duniya tana murna.
hausa.these_samples_will_be_studied_by_scien: Masana kimiyya za su yi nazarin waɗannan samfura na shekaru masu zuwa.
hausa.reset_and_start_a_new_moon_mission_fro: Sake saiti kuma ka fara sabon aikin Wata daga farko
hausa.insufficient_suborbital: 🔴 Bai isa ba — Ƙasa da Falaki
hausa.tsiolkovsky_rocket_equation_adjust_mas: Ma'aunin rokar Tsiolkovsky. Daidaita rabon nauyi, lokacin kunnawa, da takamaiman tursasawa (Isp). Sakamako daban na yanayi 3 yana nuna ko delta-V ɗinka bai isa ba, ya kai LEO, ko ya tsere daga Duniya. Babu maki, babu bayyanawa.
hausa.hypothesis_free_text_no_right_answer_w: Tunani (rubutu na kyauta — babu amsa daidai): Wace lebur ce mafi muhimmanci?
hausa.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Ka makale — Nuna tambayoyi a buɗe
hausa.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_one_watch: Riƙe sila biyu a tsaye. Motsa ɗaya. Kalla.
hausa.find_two_settings_producing_the_same_o: Nemo saiti biyu da ke samar da sakamako iri ɗaya.
hausa.which_slider_affects_v_the_most_use_th: Wace sila ce ke shafar Δv mafi yawa? Yi amfani da tarihi.
hausa.real_spacecraft_trade_fuel_mass_agains: Jiragen sama na gaskiya suna musayar nauyin man fetur da Isp. Bincika dalili.
hausa.explain_in_your_own_words_how_do_mass_: Bayyana da kalmominka: ta yaya rabon nauyi, lokacin kunnawa, da Isp suke hulɗa?
hausa.design_note_discrete_3_state_outcome_n: Bayanin ƙira: sakamako daban na yanayi 3; babu maki; babu bayyanawa — da gangan.
